name: Nice Shot! Golf Training Center
address: 7351 Heil Ave Suite B, Huntington Beach, CA 92647
about: Nice Shot! Golf Training Center is a personal and private golf learning and training facility focused on individual instruction in a state-of-the-art environment. The venue offers a non-intimidating atmosphere where students work one-on-one with a PGA Teaching Professional, free from the distractions of a crowded public range. The facility includes two simulator bays, an indoor driving range with Flightscope Xi and Skytrak Launch Monitors, and a 300 square foot putting and chipping green. Lessons are tailored to players of all abilities, with a philosophy emphasizing gradual, comprehensive skill development over time.
why_golfers_like_it: Completely private and personalized instruction environment
State-of-the-art launch monitors for accurate data and course simulation
PGA professional with over 35 years of dedicated teaching experience

food_and_drink.notes: No food or drink services mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Provides over 50 different golf courses to play
